title: Chytraculia bullata

intro: Chytraculia bullata, commonly known as African potato or umckaloabo, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae, native to Southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections, bronchitis, and sinusitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
